highlights: Built a streaming RAG natural language to SQL pipeline using FastAPI and SSE with a 7-stage agentic architecture serving multi-tenant organizations in real time.
Cut SQL hallucinations by 60% by designing a scoped dictionary system that narrows 20+ tables to the relevant subset before prompting the LLM.
Designed a deterministic keyword router covering 20+ HR domains, acting as a lightweight agent that bypasses LLM calls for 80% of common queries, saving 0.3-0.5 seconds per request.
Implemented 8 Redis cache layers across SQL results, intent, table selection, entity maps, and permissions, achieving near-zero latency on repeated queries.
Built a batch entity resolver with 24-hour TTL caching that performs information extraction, translating UUIDs across 12+ fields into human-readable names with zero extra database calls.
Created a 40+ rule canned query engine with pattern scoring and LLM-backed semantic validation, delivering sub-second answers for frequent questions.
Engineered a SQL validation framework with 10+ security checks including injection blocking, restricted column enforcement, and parameter verification.
Implemented 3-tier RBAC with module-level table gating, row-level employee scope enforcement, and admin-only query locking ensuring strict multi-tenant data isolation.
Added cross-org attack detection, context-aware multi-turn agentic query rewriting, CSV export, and follow-up suggestion generation to improve conversational UX.
Integrated 3 LLM providers (OpenAI, Claude) through an abstracted client layer with temperature-tuned lightweight models for classification and full models for SQL generation.
Developed a full-stack AI using React, Node.js, MongoDB and OpenAI API with support for multi chat sessions, image generation, and credit-based billing.
Implemented credit-controlled AI usage, reducing uncontrolled API calls by 50% and enabling Stripe-based monetization.
Optimized AI image delivery using ImageKit CDN, improving media load performance by 65% across devices.
Designed a scalable chat architecture with persistent conversations, search, timestamps, and responsive UI using Context API and Tailwind CSS.
Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and exploratory data analysis using Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib).
Built and optimized ML classification models achieving 98.2% accuracy through hyperparameter tuning.
Developed analytics dashboards using Streamlit enabling non-technical users to explore ESG and business data insights.
Built a RAG chatbot enabling natural language queries on internal knowledge data for quick information extraction and retrieval.
